name: Braised String Beans (Fassoulakia Yahni)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the onion and garlic, and sauté until soft.
2. Stir in the tomato paste and add the fresh tomato. Simmer the mixture for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Add the string beans, parsley or mint, salt, and pepper to the pan. Pour in enough water to cover the beans by about an inch.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and cover the skillet. Cook until the string beans are tender, about 20-25 minutes.
5. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed. Serve hot or warm.
Makes 4-6 servings.
